title: croton howii
intro: Croton howii, also known as the Taiwan croton, is a species of plant in the family Euphorbiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties that can help to treat various ailments. The health benefits of Croton howii include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant are typically dried and then made into teas, infusions, or taken in capsule form to harness its medicinal properties.
